name: Ouster, Inc.
business: Ouster is a leader in sensing and perception for Physical AI, offering a unified platform of high-performance digital lidar, cameras, AI compute, sensor fusion and perception software, and cutting-edge AI models to customers in industrial, smart infrastructure, robotics, and automotive markets.

exposures.sentence: We design and manufacture high-resolution digital lidar sensors that offer advanced 3D vision to machinery, vehicles, robots, and fixed infrastructure assets.

Ouster now offers Physical AI's first unified sensing and perception platform, combining high-performance digital lidar, cameras, AI compute, sensor fusion and perception software, and cutting-edge AI models.
The Gemini platform consists of OS series lidar sensors, edge processor hardware, perception software, and cloud analytics.
We target four markets globally: automotive, industrial, robotics, and smart infrastructure.
Industrial. Our industrial customers use our lidar sensors to increase safety and automate operations across the global supply chain.
This includes material handling vehicles at ports and warehouses, off-highway vehicles in mines and on farms, and manufacturing equipment in factories.
ZED is a high-performance camera that provides 2D and 3D color data with ultra-low latency.

Our sensors contain a custom-designed SoC that replaces the functionality of hundreds of discrete analog components and integrates those capabilities onto a single complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) chip.
Our automotive customers use lidar as a core component in ADAS and for autonomous driving.

catalysts.sentence: On February 4, 2026, Ouster acquired Stereolabs SAS, a developer, manufacturer and seller of AI camera vision and perception solutions.
